pkgmetadata.longdescription: nvidia-cudnn-cu12 ships the NVIDIA cuDNN deep-learning primitives library and headers as a Python wheel. It is a build/runtime dependency of dev-python/onnxruntime-gpu and other CUDA 12.x stacks. The wheel is python-version-agnostic and contains a single manylinux x86_64 binary payload (~480MB); no compilation occurs locally. Licensed under the NVIDIA cuDNN EULA; not redistributable via Gentoo mirrors.
